item.title: Restore Digital Camera Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Restore Digital Camera Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Restore Digital Camera Tool
(Utilities)
Digital camera data retrieval program is easy-to-use and non destructive data recovery tool which is used to restore or repair your deleted, missing files and folders from digital camera device even drive is corrupted message is displayed on your desktop, laptop computer. Digital camera image backup application is an advance software which can quickly restore formatted, corrupted data including jpg, gif, bmp, jpeg, riff, mpeg, wav, tif, avi, midi, png and other file formats. Digital camera file salvage utility provides comprehensive solution that recovers lost, erased digital pictures, photographs, audio video clips, music, images, snaps from damaged digital camera device. Digital camera picture rescue software can easily restore and retrieve deleted important files, folders from formatted digital camera storage media including memory card, multimedia card, xD card, sD card, compact flash card and mmc card etc. Digital camera data recovery tool recovers various types of digital camera like compact flash digital camera, line scan camera, digital video camera, point and shoot camera. Digital camera file salvage utility easily executes under windows OS including windows 11, windows 10, 7, 8, Vista, etc.Features:*Digital camera data backup software securely restores all deleted, missing photo file format from corrupted digital camera.*Digital camera image recovery application recovers inaccessible digital pictures, music collection, photographs from multimedia card of digital camera device.*Digital camera photo salvage program helps you to retrieve important files and folders which fully inaccessible.*Digital camera file retrieval utility is capable to restore all branded digital camera device including HP, Toshiba, Panasonic, Acer, Sony, Samsung and LG.

[read more]

Restore Digital Camera Tool
(Utilities)
Digital camera data retrieval program is easy-to-use and non destructive data recovery tool which is used to restore or repair your deleted, missing files and folders from digital camera device even drive is corrupted message is displayed on your desktop, laptop computer. [read more]

item.title: File Restoration Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: File Restoration Program [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
File Restoration Program
(Utilities)
Advanced file NTFS file recovery program provides option to recover and revive unlimited eliminated text data files from major windows operating system. Easily recover file software is specially designed to recover and restore audio, video, corrupted image files, partitioned disk drives important text data, erased project folders and other precious information. Easy to operate file restoration application offers most feasible solution to recapture entire damaged and corrupted data files. Professional File Recovery Software helps to retrieve missing data files in major data loss situations including system crash, software hardware malfunction, corrupted USB drives, internet virus, improper device handling and other data loss situations. Time saving file restore system revives erased and destroyed data from hard disk drive supported by major NTFS file systems. Software is fully able to recover and retrieve corrupted music tracks, videos, wallpapers of different file format. Software offers advanced technique to recapture deleted pdf files, windows applications. Amazing file recovery program is useful for different industries and organizations to revive lost deleted text files supported by all hard disk drives of different capacitates. Best file recovery system offers interactive graphical user interface to salvage entire eliminated data files. Most efficient File recovery Software helps professional as well as beginners to recover lost deleted data items. To take a trial of File Recovery Software, download application from site www.filerecoverysoftware.biz. Important Features: * File restoration application provides facility to recapture deleted data files from formatted USB drives.* Time saving file recovery software has ability to view recovered files before their final recovery from your laptop.* Most promising file restoration tool is fully compatible to all Microsoft windows operating system platforms.

[read more]

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".

item.title: Professional File Restoration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional File Restoration Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: ntfsfilerecovery
item.itunes:summary:
Professional File Restoration Tool
(Utilities)
Is it possible to regain deleted multimedia files from mistakenly formatted removable storage media? Download cost effective and award winning Files Recovery Software that empowers user to get back whole misplaced data from major data loss incidents like accidental deletion, software/hardware malfunction, disk corruption, booting error, virus/worm infection, improper device usages etc in simplified manner. Affordable data rescue application provides enhanced data scanning facility to easily search and regain all deleted text files, images, audio, video clips, snapshots, office documents etc from accidentally formatted flash storage drive.

[read more]

Affordable data rescue application provides enhanced data scanning facility to easily search and regain all deleted text files, images, audio, video clips, snapshots, office documents etc from accidentally formatted flash storage drive.

item.title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: AAAAXY [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: divverent
item.itunes:summary:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.description:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
AAAAXY
(Jump N Run)
AAAAXY is a nonlinear 2D puzzle platformer taking place in impossible spaces.
Although your general goal is reaching the surprising end of the game, you are encouraged to set your own goals while playing. Exploration will be rewarded, and secrets await you!

So jump and run around, and enjoy losing your sense of orientation in this World of Wicked Weirdness. Find out what Van Vlijmen will make you do. Pick a path, get inside a Klein Bottle, recognize some memes, and by all means: don't look up.

And beware of a minor amount of trolling.

To reach the end, a new player will take about 4 to 6 hours, a full playthrough can be finished in about 1 hour and the end can be reached in about 15 minutes.

item.title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]

item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK: Unleash the Power of Gaming on Android! Experience the ultimate gaming performance on your Android device with the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK. This powerful and intuitive launcher optimizes your gaming experience, offering enhanced graphics, smooth gameplay, and customizable settings. Elevate your gaming sessions with advanced features such as game boosting, performance optimization, and seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular titles. Download the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK from revWhiteShadow on a gaming adventure like never before!"
